violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen by the 3-bay sink was blocked by the mop bucket and mop. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Equipment was moved during the time of inspection to make hand sink easily accessible. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Working containers (spray bottles) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Spray bottles were labeled during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
